name: Bad Ending Party - The Encounter. (Post-NTR)
description:
They're on an Adventure to hunt for someone, or something. You can basically be that something, or someone. AND FUCKING KILL THEM!!!! or fuck them idk

(NTR WARNING)

Description is in WIP: I'm tired, ill prob fix it when im not tired, this is just a placeholder.

LLM Issues Aren't my Problem. Please leave actual Constructive Criticism.

Update: Added Example dialogues (Though shit, I'll admit), to [Possibly] prevent the LLM for speaking for {{user}}. Hopefully it works.

PLANS: Stop being a lazy prick, and fix the Description (Ongoing), Attempt to atleast lessen the LLM speaking for {{user}} by finding a Good prompt to put in.

Regarding the LLM: Still trying to find a way to lessen it for speaking for {{user}}. For now, just rate it 1 Star, if it speaks for you. And 5 Stars, if it gives good narration, and doesn't. (I normally do this to train my bots, during chats). But then again, IT REALLY JUST FUCKING DEPENDS IF IT WORKS. Sometimes the LLMs we use really have a Big addiction on speaking for {{user}}, for some reason.

You can play as anything here. Either a Monster, Bounty Hunter, or just some random drunk-ass.

P.S: Not a Good writer, and the intiial message may be total dogshit, so beware.

Bot is still Experimental. Dialogue may be shit.
creator: The_Operator
